Index.meta_title: VLOStats | The Rating That Knows Your Game
Index.meta_description: Free, automated pickleball ratings that update after every club session. Separate left-side and right-side Elo, live leaderboards, and zero-effort admin tools. Your daily club engine.

Hero.title: The Rating That <important>Knows Your Game</important>
Hero.description: Updated after every session. Split by left side and right side. Free for every player at your club. This is the daily club engine your game has been waiting for.

MissingPiece.section_title: Your Rating Should Work as Hard as You Do
MissingPiece.intro: You play three nights a week at your local club. You grind kitchen rallies, sharpen your third-shot drops, and battle-test new partners every session. But your rating? It only updates when you travel to a tournament and pay for the privilege.
MissingPiece.status_quo_point1: Updates a few times a year after sanctioned bracket play
MissingPiece.status_quo_point2: Costs entry fees every time you want a fresh number
MissingPiece.status_quo_point3: One blended rating — no left-side or right-side distinction
MissingPiece.status_quo_point4: Doesn't capture the improvement happening between tournaments
MissingPiece.vlo_point1: Recalculates automatically after every club session
MissingPiece.vlo_point2: 100% free — no entry fees, no subscriptions, no hidden costs
MissingPiece.vlo_point3: Independent left-side and right-side Elo from a 1500 baseline
MissingPiece.vlo_point4: Visualizes your growth curve week over week with real match data
MissingPiece.closing: Tournament ratings are for the big stage. VLOStats is for the daily grind — where real improvement happens.

Pricing.section_description: Choose the plan that fits your club.

HowItWorks.section_description: From signup to your first rated session in under five minutes.
HowItWorks.step1_description: Your club admin registers the club and shares a simple join code. You sign up, enter the code, and you're on the roster. No membership fee. No per-session charge. No subscription. Just a code and you're in.
HowItWorks.step2_description: Club leaders create recurring sessions — Tuesday nights, Saturday mornings, whatever fits your courts. The system auto-generates every match date for the season, locks signups before start time, and handles matchmaking by VLO rating. Sub rotation keeps everyone on the court. Set it up once and never think about it again.
HowItWorks.step3_description: Step on the court, play your doubles match, and log the score when you're done. Here's the difference: VLOStats tracks separate left-side and right-side ratings. A 4.0 on the left isn't always a 4.0 on the right — and your Elo knows it. Each side adjusts independently based on opponent strength and margin of victory. One player logs, one opponent confirms. Done.
HowItWorks.step4_description: Open your dashboard and see a rating curve that actually moves. Track your best partners, toughest opponents, win streaks, and per-side progression over time. The club-wide leaderboard splits by division and filters by left-side, right-side, or overall. This isn't a vanity number — it's a training tool that shows you exactly where your game is growing.

AdminSuperpowers.section_description: You run a club, not a tournament desk. VLOStats gives you back the hours you used to spend on spreadsheets, group texts, and court assignments.
AdminSuperpowers.feature1_description: The system generates balanced doubles pairings across your full roster using VLO ratings. No clipboard. No arguing over courts. Skill-weighted randomization means every game is competitive and every player gets fair matchups.
AdminSuperpowers.feature2_description: Create a recurring schedule in three fields: day, time, location. The system generates every date for the season automatically. Signups lock before start time so nobody ghosts last-minute. Set it once, run it all season.
AdminSuperpowers.feature3_description: Player no-shows mid-session? Swap them out in two taps. Rain-out? Cancel cleanly. Need to delete a mislogged match? Emergency re-calculate preserves every verified result and zeros out anything unplayed. Full audit trail, zero panic.

CTA.title: Your club deserves better tools. They're free.
CTA.description: Register in two minutes. Your players get rated by next week. Join the growing network of clubs running smarter sessions with VLOStats.
